review-calibrator.title: Soften hard review corridor
review-calibrator.hypothesis: A mild corridor relaxation increases review recall by reducing direct speech routing in ambiguous spans.
editStrategy: Adjust `previewHardReviewDecisionMargin` and related combined margin thresholds conservatively.
Keep uncertainty gate behavior but raise review capture in low-margin cases.

review-calibrator.title: Strengthen bleed-uncertainty review routing
review-calibrator.hypothesis: Ambiguous overlap segments should bias to review instead of speech, improving review recall.
editStrategy: Increase sensitivity of `uncertainty_bleed_gate` for close keep/suppress margins.
Avoid changing high-confidence keep behavior.

review-calibrator.title: Bias decision-type mapping toward review in mixed evidence
review-calibrator.hypothesis: Mixed speech/bleed/laughter evidence can be classified as review more often without damaging speech recall.
editStrategy: Tune decision to type mapping when class margins are low.
Preserve deterministic mapping to `contentType` in finalize stage.

duration-specialist.title: Rebalance pre/post snippet padding
duration-specialist.hypothesis: Smaller asymmetric padding better approximates target durations.
editStrategy: Try conservative reductions on before/after pads.
Preserve handover continuity safeguards.

duration-specialist.title: Tune merge windows for finer segmentation
duration-specialist.hypothesis: Lower merge gap windows reduce overlong segments and improve good/near ratio.
editStrategy: Reduce preview and same-track merge windows incrementally.
Protect against fragmented micro-segments.

duration-specialist.title: Align postprocess minimum duration floor
duration-specialist.hypothesis: Lower but controlled post-overlap min duration improves near-duration matches.
editStrategy: Tune `postOverlapMinSegmentMs` with quality checks on speech recall.
Avoid aggressive pruning that hurts speech retention.

silence-pruner.title: Increase overlap/bleed suppression weighting
silence-pruner.hypothesis: False-positive speech in bleed-heavy sections is reduced by slightly stronger suppression pressure.
editStrategy: Raise suppression pressure only where overlap trust is high.
Keep clean non-overlap speech mostly unchanged.

silence-pruner.title: Tighten residual noise pruning
silence-pruner.hypothesis: A stricter residual snippet prune drops noise-like fragments and improves ignore recall.
editStrategy: Adjust residual snippet thresholds in small increments.
Monitor speech recall to avoid over-pruning.

speech-retainer.title: Protect low-energy speech continuity
speech-retainer.hypothesis: Mildly longer hold and dropout continuity keeps quiet valid speech.
editStrategy: Increase low-energy continuity only where speech evidence exists.
Avoid blanket sensitivity increase.

speech-retainer.title: Recenter speech threshold margins
speech-retainer.hypothesis: Slight threshold recentering recovers missed speech without large ignore regressions.
editStrategy: Adjust thresholds conservatively by small deltas.
Pair with check/eval gate to reject unstable changes.

validator.title: Full quality gate
validator.hypothesis: Only keep changes that improve objective score and preserve core recalls.
editStrategy: Run `npm run check` and `node scripts/evaluate_pipeline.js`.
Compare `reports/autoresearch/last_eval.json` before/after and reject regressions.
